name: Armored dead
description: Helmet, visor, layered plate — it died in riot gear and still wears it. Blunt strikes skid off; it takes a firearm through the gaps, or the patience to leave it be.
notes: T46 · mirrors the engine ENEMIES table (combat.ts). maxHp 5 + armor 1: melee (1-2) is blunted to 0-1 net, so putting it down by hand is slow and costly; a firearm ignores armor (FIRE_DMG 3, two shots). The right approach is a bullet or a wide berth (FR-CBT-07). Keyed to zombie.riot.
